headline: Super vs Orchids — Personal AI Agents for Real Computer Work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Orchids. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost. Include a long-form buyer guide with a decision matrix, migration checklist, how-to evaluation plan, and source-backed caveats.
site_brief.title: Super vs Orchids

summary: A fair, practical comparison of Super and Orchids for people evaluating personal AI agents and computer-use assistants. We explain what Orchids is designed for, where it fits in the broader agent landscape alongside Folk, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Grok, and why Super is the sharper alternative for repeated computer-use workflows thanks to its reusable computer-use cache. Includes a long-form buyer guide, step-by-step evaluation plan, checklist, risks, FAQs, and source-backed market context.
